case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. KARLA PATRICIA DURAN-MORENO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARLA PATRICIA DURAN_MORENO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURAN-MORENO, KARLA PATRICIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN-MORENO, KARLA PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-11-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 (CALENDAR ERROR) TRIAL OF MAR-12-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
